*ੈ✿‧₊˚ Deciding to take a break from his Port Mafia duties, Chuuya opts on leaving PM headquarters to visit Dazai—It’s 2.AM, and its Dazai’s birthday… sure, it was early to bring it up, and he usually did it with gritted teeth and a barely hidden look of embarrassment, but… for some reason, he feels unsettled, and he needs to visit Dazai to stop the feeling of unease in his chest; what he sees doesn’t ease him in the slightest, it only confirms the fear he attempted to brush off as paranoia.

Please do not recreate my bots, or repost them here or on any other platform.
